description_long: This is a modern single-story house set within a rectangular fenced lot, featuring a paved driveway leading to a carport and a landscaped front yard with several mature trees. The house has a flat roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The backyard is enclosed with a wooden fence and includes a garden area with flowering trees and shrubs, as well as a patio space for outdoor living. The exterior walls are a mix of white and natural wood finishes, contributing to the clean, minimalist look. The property is surrounded by a white fence in the front and a wooden fence in the rear, clearly demarcating private and public spaces. The overall design emphasizes open space, greenery, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and wood finishes, set in a landscaped lot with front and back gardens and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, car, main entrance, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and a white fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard with a wooden fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard garden, patio, flowering trees, and the wooden fence enclosing the private outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, front yard, and the side of the house with visible windows and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, no porch, flanked by large windows and accessed via a paved path from the driveway.
